zotero.abstractNote: We present a method for synthesizing 3D abstractions of buildings from single images. Our approach leverages a procedural building model and a transformer-based architecture to invert the procedural parameters from an input image. By learning to map images to the latent space of a procedural generator, we can recover compact, editable, and semantically meaningful 3D representations. We demonstrate that our method produces high-quality 3D abstractions that are consistent with the input images and can be easily manipulated for downstream tasks.
